'''malacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:whack|whack]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whack|whack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| malacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mælæchæth|mælæchæth]] || [[word:mælæchæj|mælæchæj]] || [[word:mælæchæsh|mælæchæsh]] || [[word:mælæchæ|mælæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:malalachath|malalachath]] || [[word:malalachaj|malalachaj]] || [[word:malalachash|malalachash]] || [[word:malalacha|malalacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:malachath|malachath]] || [[word:malachaj|malachaj]] || [[word:malachash|malachash]] || [[word:malacha|malacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:malafchath|malafchath]] || [[word:malafchaj|malafchaj]] || [[word:malafchash|malafchash]] || [[word:malafchaf|malafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:malachatha|malachatha]] || [[word:malachaja|malachaja]] || [[word:malachasha|malachasha]] || [[word:malachaka|malachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:malachath|malachath]] || [[word:malachaj|malachaj]] || [[word:malachash|malachash]] || [[word:malacha|malacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:malachathal|malachathal]] || [[word:malachajal|malachajal]] || [[word:malachashal|malachashal]] || [[word:malachakal|malachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:malachathatha|malachathatha]] || [[word:malachajaja|malachajaja]] || [[word:malachashasha|malachashasha]] || [[word:malachaka|malachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:malachathan|malachathan]] || [[word:malachajan|malachajan]] || [[word:malachashan|malachashan]] || [[word:malachakan|malachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:malachathaoro|malachathaoro]] || [[word:malachajaoro|malachajaoro]] || [[word:malachashaoro|malachashaoro]] || [[word:malachakaoro|malachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|97f1258}}
